name: codex-multi-auth
description: Multi-account auth helper for Codex operators

interface.shortDescription: Operator guidance for multi-account auth workflows
interface.longDescription: Adds guidance for login, switching, diagnostics, and repair workflows while keeping the existing codex auth wrapper as the runtime path.
defaultPrompt: Use codex auth status before modifying auth state
Ask before running browser login or destructive cleanup
Prefer codex auth forecast and doctor for diagnostics
